## Summary

<!-- What changed, why it changed, and who or what is affected? -->

Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature or public behavior change
- [ ] Tests, tooling, CI, or packaging
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Research result or generated evidence

## Validation

<!-- List exact checks and commands run. Explain any skipped or unavailable check. -->

```text
uv run pre-commit run --all-files
uv run pytest
```

## Compatibility and impact

<!-- Note CLI/API/schema changes, supported platforms and engines, performance,
release impact, migrations, or deprecations. Write "None" when not applicable. -->

## Research and artifact provenance

<!-- For research claims or generated evidence, record the model, engine and
code revisions, hardware, configuration, command, date, baselines, raw output,
and known limitations. Write "Not applicable" for other changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The diff is scoped to the linked issue or stated objective.
- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior, or I explained why tests are not applicable.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog entries are updated when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] New dependencies, downloads, and generated files have clear provenance and compatible licensing.
- [ ] Logs and artifacts contain no secrets, private paths, personal information, or restricted data.
- [ ] Breaking, packaging, schema, or release implications are called out explicitly.
